function.arguments:
{"thought": "I have created the API routes and the basic pages for the restaurant management application. Now I need to implement the components and the remaining logic to make the application functional.

Based on the scratchpad, I have already created:
- API routes: `src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts`, `src/app/api/menu/route.ts`, `src/app/api/orders/route.ts`
- Pages: `src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`, `src/app/menu/page.tsx`, `src/app/orders/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/login/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/register/page.tsx`

I still need to create the components mentioned in the scratchpad:
- `src/components/Navbar.tsx`
- `src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx`
- `src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx`
- `src/components/OrderTable.tsx`

And the middleware and environment example:
- `src/middleware.ts`
- `.env.example`

I will proceed to create these files now.
"}
